## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Changes

- Bullet the concrete edits so reviewers can check each one.

## Testing

- [ ] `make check-all` passes locally (fmt, clippy, deny, check, test-matrix, doc, hygiene, machete).
- [ ] Integration tests cover the new behavior, where applicable.
- [ ] For protocol changes: referenced RFC section in code comments and in the PR description.

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay attention to: trade-offs considered, follow-ups deferred, known limitations.
